title: Tend packs and sessions for phase accuracy
goal: Keep packs and sessions accurate, traceable, and aligned to the active project phase.

steps.text: Review phase context, recent changes, and currently active workflows.
Identify pack/session drift, stale entries, and missing coverage.
If proposed changes include gardener-owned artifacts, mark the pass as self-gardening and keep standard review gates.
Run `gardening-v2-checklist` and capture pass status before recommendations are finalized.
Update markdown and JSONL maintenance logs with findings and prioritized recommendations.
Record one health snapshot and update recommendation feedback entries before review pause.
Publish ranked `GREC-*` recommendations with score breakdown, why-now rationale, and expected impact.
Run policy-conflict detection, self-gardening safety preflight, and pack-coverage auditing checks before review pause.
Pause for review before applying non-trivial pack/session changes.
Apply approved updates and run validation.

acceptanceCriteria: Maintenance log entry is recorded for the active phase
JSONL gardening entry is recorded using the shared contract
Health snapshot and recommendation feedback logs are updated for the pass
Ranked recommendation output is recorded with deterministic scoring and explanations
Coverage and policy/safety preflight checks are recorded and passing before non-trivial updates
Self-gardening passes are explicitly labeled when gardener-owned artifacts are modified
Gardening v2 checklist pass status is recorded
Improvement backlog is updated with prioritized follow-ups
Approved pack/session updates are bounded and traceable

verification.text: Confirm logs include affected IDs and verification status
Confirm Docs/PersonaKit/Development/logs/gardening-events.jsonl entries satisfy required base fields
Confirm validation passes for updated pack root
